//: Vercel Hobby tier limits — daily cadence + 2 cron jobs max. Trimmed to the two load-bearing crons that fit those constraints. The 5 originally-configured schedules (reveal, resolve, reputation, agent-fleet, verify-bot at sub-daily cadences) are preserved in vercel.json.pro for the day this project upgrades to Pro tier or migrates to GitHub Actions scheduled workflows. For now: reputation, agent-fleet, and verify-bot are off-cron and need to be fired manually via curl with CRON_SECRET when wanted (or skipped — they no-op gracefully without env-var prereqs anyway).
